name: Light and Spicy Pumpkin Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease and flour a 15 x 10 x 1-inch baking pan.
3. Lightly spoon flour into measuring cup; level off.
4. In a large bowl, beat the flours, brown sugar, baking powder, baking soda, spices, salt, oil, apple juice, pumpkin and eggs on low speed until moistened.
5. Beat for 2 minutes on medium speed.
6. Spread evenly in the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool completely.
9. For the frosting, combine the powdered sugar, margarine, vanilla extract and enough yogurt for desired spreading consistency; beat until smooth.
10. Frost the cooled bars; sprinkle with nutmeg, if desired.
11. Refrigerate to set the frosting; cut into bars.
